mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER_EXP_HISTORY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER_EXP_HISTORY( ID, USER_EXP_HISTORY_TYPE, USER_EXP_HISTORY_AMOUNT, USER_EXP_HISTORY_TARGET_ID, USER_ID ) VALUES( #{id}, #{userExpHistoryType}, #{userExpHistoryAmount}, #{userExpHistoryTargetId}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER_EXP_HISTORY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_EXP_HISTORY_TYPE IN ('POST', 'COMMENT') AND TRUNC(USER_EXP_HISTORY_CREATE_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER_EXP_HISTORY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_EXP_HISTORY_TYPE = 'ATTENDANCE' AND TRUNC(USER_EXP_HISTORY_CREATE_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
